snippet.title: Unlocking Mentorship Success: Practical Tips for Aspiring Mentors | Scott Jeffrey Miller
snippet.description:
Unleash your leadership potential and skyrocket your career with Scott Jeffrey Miller's practical and game-changing book: The Ultimate Guide to Great Mentorship - dive into the world of mentorship like never before!

The Passion Struck Podcast is HERE!! 💥 https://passionstruck.com/passion-struck-podcast/👈 Listen, follow, and rate wherever you listen to your favorite podcasts OR watch here on YouTube. New episodes drop every Tuesday,  Thursday, and Friday!
---
In this episode of Passion Struck with John R. Miles, you will be able to:
1. Discover the powerful impact mentorship can have on your personal and professional journey.
2. Gain invaluable insights from Scott Jeffrey Miller's book on top-notch mentorship practices.
3. Grasp the importance of setting boundaries in mentorship to safeguard your professional integrity.
4. Realize the essential role of the challenger in providing useful feedback for your self-growth.
5. Understand that being a mentor isn't limited to age or experience, implying how mentorship benefits both parties.

My special guest is Scott Jeffrey Miller:
Say hello to Scott Miller, a distinguished advisor in thought leadership and a former executive at the leadership-development powerhouse Franklin Covey. As the charismatic host of the On Leadership with Scott Miller podcast, Scott substantiates his standing as an indiscernible thought leader in his sphere. His previous works, including the riveting Mess to Success series and the lauded Everyone Deserves a Great Manager, highlight his profound understanding of mentorship and leadership - a talent further represented in his newest, much-anticipated book The Ultimate Guide to Great Mentorship.

--►Purchase The Ulitmate Guide to Great Mentorship: https://amzn.to/3NIZhBm  (Amazon Link)

Thank You to Our Sponsors:
Hello Fresh: https://www.hellofresh.com/passionstruck50
Indeed: https://indeed.com/passionstruck
Lifeforce: https://mylifeforce.com for $200 off

--► Full show notes and resources can be found here: https://passionstruck.com/scott-jeffrey-miller-on-mentorship/
--► Subscribe to the podcast: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/passion-struck-with-john-r-miles/id1553279283.
--► Subscribe to Passion Struck Clips: https://www.youtube.com/@passionstruckclips
*Our Patreon Page: https://www.patreon.com/passionstruck.

Time stamps
0:00 Introducing Scott Miller
2:51 Mentorship is not just a buzzword
7:05 How Scott got his start at FranklinCovey
13:27 Book writing advice
16:06 The 13 roles that all mentors play.
18:52 The transformative power of mentorship
24:30 Stedman Graham on identity leadership.
27:02 What defines great leaders
31:57 Most people don't fear failure. They fear other people seeing them fail.
38:28 Why boundaries are critical in a mentor-mentee relationship.
44:25 Challenging negative mindsets.
47:21 The role of a challenger as a mentor
53:07 Mentors can create the conditions for higher engagement.

Want to watch more in-depth interviews with some of the world’s most insightful people? Find full episodes here: https://www.youtube.com/c/JohnRMiles.

Connect with John R. Miles:
Learn more about John: https://johnrmiles.com/
Visit the Passion Struck Podcast: https://passionstruck.com/passion-struck-podcast/
Visit the John R. Miles BLOG: https://johnrmiles.com/blog/
Follow John on TWITTER: https://twitter.com/john_rmiles/
Follow John on INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/john_r_miles/
Like John on FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/johnrmiles.c0m

snippet.title: 366 :: Scott Jeffrey Miller: The Ultimate Guide to Great Mentorship . . . via Disney,...
snippet.description:
In episode 366, Bradley is joined by speaker and author Scott Jeffrey Miller. They discuss Miller's new book, The Ultimate Guide to Great Mentorship. Miller shares insights from his own mentoring experiences emphasizing the roles of "revealer," "validator," "challenger," and "celebrator" in effective mentorship. He also highlights the value of adapting mentorship styles to individual needs and preferences.

 

 This episode is brought to you by The Simple Sales Pipeline® which will organize and value any construction sales rep's roster of customers and prospects in under 30 minutes.

 ***

 If you enjoyed this podcast, we'd sincerely appreciate it if you left a review on Apple Podcasts. The feedback helps improve the show and helps with our visibility as well. The more people listen to the podcast, the more we can invest into it to make it even better.

  

 Since we're asking for things . . . we'd also love it if you recommended this show to your friends and colleagues. Your network looks to people like you to learn where to invest their time and attention. We'd love the opportunity to add value to more people in our community.

 For more info: The Construction Leadership Podcast

 Follow us on Instagram: instagram.com/bradleyhartmannandco/

 Subscribe to our YouTube Channel: Bradley Hartmann & Co.

snippet.title: What the Best Leaders Do Differently with Scott Jeffrey Miller | Ep #254 of No Bullsh!t Leadership
snippet.description:
💬🔔 Subscribe For More Practical Leadership Tools and Techniques: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOKc_KAA3Kt26i8yF3S2_Jg?sub_confirmation=1 

One email popped into our Inbox a few months ago, and we couldn’t resist it.

You see, we’re approached all the time to interview other thought leaders on this podcast.

However, since No Bullsh!t Leadership is predominantly a solo cast, we reluctantly decline 99% of these requests.

And this was the 1%.

Scott Jeffrey Miller is a speaker, author, and podcaster (sounds familiar, I know!)
 
 
What’s different about Scott is that he’s worked for over 25 years with FranklinCovey, the legendary company started by Stephen Covey, which has not one, but three seminal works to draw upon:

- The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People 
- The Speed of Trust, and
-The 4 Disciplines of Execution (one of my favorites).

Scott has worked with these original thought leaders for decades, and as host of FranklinCovey’s On Leadership podcast, he’s had access to some of the best-known and highest-profile leaders on the planet.
 
In today’s interview, I drill into Scott’s deep learning, asking him what it’s like to interview the biggest names in business; his experience of writing best-selling books; and what’s in store for the future of leadership.

VISIT THE EPISODE PAGE WITH THE FULL TRANSCRIPT HERE: https://www.yourceomentor.com/what-the-best-leaders-do-differently

YOU CAN CHECK OUT SCOTT'S NEW BOOK HERE: https://www.greatmentorship.com/

———————————————— 

📱 Subscribe and Listen to the No Bullsh!t Leadership podcast HERE:
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/yourceomentor
Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/gb/podcast/no-bullsh-t-leadership/id1434654553
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/1V0NXT2ofFcnIP3MGEHjU1?si=88e3986cd2fa4db2


You can connect with me at:
Website: https://www.yourceomentor.com
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/yourceomentor
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/yourceomentor.com
Linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/in/martin-moore-075b001/

 ———————— 

Our mission here at Your CEO Mentor:

To improve the quality of leaders, globally.

———————— 

WANT MORE? Here's how you can work with Martin G. Moore: 

📌 FREE MASTERCLASS: Learn how to level up your leadership skills and confidence over 5 days at: https://www.leadershipbeyondthetheory.com/leadership-masterclass 

📌 BOOK: Check out Martin’s WSJ Bestselling book No Bullsh!t Leadership here: https://www.martingmoore.com/TheBook
